code: import React from"react";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const STATUS_MAP={pending:{label:"Chờ xác nhận",className:"status-badge status-pending"},confirmed:{label:"Đã xác nhận",className:"status-badge status-confirmed"},cancelled:{label:"Đã hủy",className:"status-badge status-cancelled"},available:{label:"Còn trống",className:"status-badge status-available"},unavailable:{label:"Không khả dụng",className:"status-badge status-cancelled"},open:{label:"Đang mở",className:"status-badge status-confirmed"},closed:{label:"Đã đóng",className:"status-badge status-cancelled"},admin:{label:"Admin",className:"status-badge status-admin"},user:{label:"Người dùng",className:"status-badge status-user"}};function StatusBadge(_ref){let{status}=_ref;if(!status)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"status-badge status-muted",children:"\u2014"});const key=String(status).toLowerCase().trim();const config=STATUS_MAP[key];if(config){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:config.className,children:config.label});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"status-badge status-muted",children:status});}export default StatusBadge;
